race.comment: GAMBINO (4) placed over this track and trip two back before just missing the frame at Ipswich last time out when well in the betting. Gets 2kg off from the low draw and where there's smoke there's fire. Rates the testing material. ARCHIE MAXIMUS (6) has won two of his past three including one over this course and distance at the latest outing. Must be respected out of the Dunn barn. BOLLINGER MISS (5) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and will find this easier than recent efforts in town. In the mix. KING COBAMA (9) won his maiden two back at Warwick then could only manage seventh last start over 1350m at Doomben. Can feature.
